# Portfolio Prioritization Report

## Purpose
Document portfolio scoring, prioritization decisions, and funding recommendations.

## Audience
Portfolio Manager, PMO Lead, Executive Sponsors, Finance Partner.

## Inputs
- Demand intake requests.
- Business case and ROI data.
- Portfolio constraints and strategic objectives.

## Required Sections
- Portfolio overview
- Scoring methodology
- Prioritization results
- Funding recommendations
- Risks and trade-offs

## 1. Portfolio Overview
Summarize the portfolio context and capacity constraints.

## 2. Scoring Methodology
| Criterion | Weight | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |

## 3. Prioritization Results
| Initiative | Score | Strategic Alignment | Financial Impact | Recommendation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

## 4. Funding Recommendations
- **Recommended approvals:**
- **Deferred items:**
- **Capacity impacts:**

## 5. Risks & Trade-offs
Describe portfolio-level risks, dependencies, and trade-offs.

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Scoring criteria agreed with stakeholders.
- [ ] Results reviewed with portfolio governance.
- [ ] Funding recommendations documented.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Report provides transparent scoring and prioritization rationale.
- Recommendations align with strategy and capacity.
